description: Baseline failed before completion due to no space left on device while saving teacher logits cache.

asi.hypothesis: Run baseline candidate T=2 alpha=0.80 labeled=0.50 unlabeled=1.00 on exploration seeds 30-32.
asi.error: RuntimeError: No space left on device saving teacher logits cache
asi.rollback_reason: Benchmark infrastructure/storage failure, not recipe failure.
asi.next_action_hint: Inspect cache/disk usage and clean safe transient cache/log artifacts before re-running baseline.

description: Baseline repaired benchmark wrapper and ran T=2 alpha=0.80 labeled=0.50 unlabeled=1.00 on exploration folds.

asi.hypothesis: Baseline T=2 with strong unlabeled KD and moderate labeled KD should provide the incumbent robust generalization reference.
asi.notes: Recreated missing autoresearch_candidate.json and autoresearch_eval.py after crash cleanup; wrapper restores log.txt after benchmark.

description: T=1.5 sharper KD reduced robust generalization versus T=2 baseline.

asi.hypothesis: A lower KD temperature may sharpen teacher targets and improve transfer without class-specific tuning.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary generalization_score fell from 0.82478782 to 0.81800101, with worse stress_mean and stress_worst.
asi.next_action_hint: Avoid T=1.5 at alpha=0.80; try modestly higher T or adjust labeled KD weight globally.

description: T=2.5 candidate JSON syntax error before benchmark ran.

asi.hypothesis: A slightly softer KD temperature T=2.5 may improve robust transfer.
asi.error: JSONDecodeError: missing comma after description edit
asi.rollback_reason: Candidate file syntax error; no model training occurred.
asi.next_action_hint: Re-apply T=2.5 edit with valid JSON and rerun.

description: T=2.5 softer KD underperformed baseline across clean and stress metrics.

asi.hypothesis: A slightly softer KD temperature T=2.5 may improve robust teacher transfer.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary generalization_score dropped from 0.82478782 to 0.80242357; clean accuracy and stress worst both degraded materially.
asi.next_action_hint: Keep T=2.0 as the local temperature; explore alpha/labeled KD weights instead.

description: Alpha=0.75 candidate JSON syntax error before benchmark ran.

asi.hypothesis: Reducing alpha to 0.75 may balance hard-label supervision and KD transfer more robustly.
asi.error: JSONDecodeError: missing comma after description edit
asi.rollback_reason: Candidate file syntax error; no model training occurred.
asi.next_action_hint: Re-apply alpha=0.75 edit with valid JSON comma.

description: Alpha=0.75 improved robust generalization with higher clean accuracy and stress worst at T=2.

asi.hypothesis: Reducing alpha to 0.75 balances hard-label supervision and KD transfer, improving generalization without class-specific tuning.
asi.notes: Improvement comes from clean accuracy and stress_worst despite slightly worse calibrated loss and flat stress_mean.

description: Alpha=0.70 gave a small further generalization gain at T=2 via higher clean accuracy.

asi.hypothesis: Further reducing alpha to 0.70 increases hard-label grounding while retaining enough KD signal for robust generalization.
asi.notes: Primary improved slightly over alpha=0.75 due to clean accuracy, but stress metrics regressed to roughly baseline; confirm cautiously before adopting.

name: ML2 CV Robust Generalization Search Continued

description: Continued segment baseline: current best alpha=0.70 T=2 labeled=0.50 unlabeled=1.00.

asi.hypothesis: Re-establish current best previous-segment candidate as baseline before continuing search.
asi.notes: Deterministic rerun matched previous metric exactly.

description: Increasing labeled KD weight to 0.75 at alpha=0.70 harmed clean and stress generalization.

asi.hypothesis: A stronger global labeled KD term could improve teacher semantic transfer while retaining unlabeled KD.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary generalization_score dropped sharply from 0.83049196 to 0.79197542; clean accuracy fell over 3 points and calibrated loss worsened.
asi.next_action_hint: Do not increase labeled_kd_weight at alpha=0.70; if testing labeled KD, pair with alpha=0.75 or reduce unlabeled instead.

description: Reducing unlabeled KD weight to 0.75 at alpha=0.70 underperformed the current best.

asi.hypothesis: Reducing unlabeled KD could lessen teacher noise and improve hard-label grounding while retaining broad unlabeled signal.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary generalization_score fell from 0.83049196 to 0.80941319 with worse clean accuracy, loss, and stress metrics.
asi.next_action_hint: Keep unlabeled_kd_weight at 1.00 for alpha=0.70; the unlabeled teacher signal appears important.

description: Alpha=0.85 candidate timed out before producing metrics.

asi.hypothesis: Increasing alpha to 0.85 might improve robustness by leaning more on teacher KD at T=2.
asi.error: run_experiment timed out after extended runtime; only HF Hub unauthenticated warning was captured at tail.
asi.rollback_reason: No complete benchmark metrics were produced, so candidate cannot be evaluated.
asi.next_action_hint: Do not retry alpha=0.85 immediately; try lower-alpha neighborhood around the current best instead.

description: Alpha=0.65 reduced generalization versus alpha=0.70 current best.

asi.hypothesis: Continuing the lower-alpha trend from 0.80 to 0.70 could further improve hard-label grounding while retaining KD.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary generalization_score fell from 0.83049196 to 0.82442269, with lower clean accuracy and worse calibrated loss.
asi.next_action_hint: Alpha optimum on exploration seeds appears near 0.70-0.75; avoid going below 0.70 without other compensating changes.

description: Epoch=65 horizon test was aborted before producing metrics.

asi.hypothesis: A shorter 65-epoch student training horizon might improve robustness or loss versus the 75-epoch incumbent.
asi.error: run_experiment returned aborted before metrics were produced.
asi.rollback_reason: No complete benchmark metrics were produced, so the candidate cannot be evaluated.
asi.next_action_hint: Do not infer anything from this abort; prioritize alpha midpoint at epoch 75 per persisted research state.

description: Alpha midpoint 0.725 underperformed badly versus alpha=0.70/0.75 candidates.

asi.hypothesis: The optimum may lie between alpha=0.70 clean-favoring and alpha=0.75 stress_worst-favoring settings.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary generalization_score fell from 0.83049196 to 0.80099436, with materially worse clean accuracy and stress metrics.
asi.next_action_hint: Do not shave alpha midpoint further on these exploration seeds; next test reduced labeled KD while preserving full unlabeled KD.

description: Reduced labeled KD improved loss but hurt stress worst, below current best score.

asi.hypothesis: Reducing labeled teacher imitation while preserving full unlabeled KD may follow evidence that increasing labeled KD was harmful.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary generalization_score remained below incumbent 0.83049196 and stress_worst dropped substantially to 0.52631579 despite better raw loss.
asi.next_action_hint: Reduced labeled KD is not a score winner at alpha=0.70; test it once at alpha=0.75 only if prioritizing robustness/loss tradeoffs, otherwise move to epoch or small temperature nudges.

description: Reduced labeled KD at robust alpha=0.75 underperformed current best and original alpha=0.75.

asi.hypothesis: At alpha=0.75, reducing labeled KD might preserve the better stress_worst profile while improving hard-label grounding.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary generalization_score fell to 0.81637989 with lower clean accuracy and worse stress_worst than both incumbent and original alpha=0.75.
asi.next_action_hint: Stop labeled_kd_weight tuning; evidence supports keeping labeled=0.50 and unlabeled=1.00.

description: Epoch=70 training horizon underperformed the 75-epoch incumbent at alpha=0.70.

asi.hypothesis: A 70-epoch horizon might interpolate between possible shorter-training robustness and the 75-epoch incumbent.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary generalization_score fell from 0.83049196 to 0.81186520, with much lower clean accuracy and no stress compensation.
asi.next_action_hint: Keep epoch=75 as incumbent; do not pursue shorter horizon unless a true checkpoint-selection implementation is added.

description: T=1.75 lower-temperature nudge underperformed T=2 at alpha=0.70.

asi.hypothesis: With a less teacher-heavy alpha=0.70, a slightly sharper T=1.75 KD target might improve transfer versus T=2.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary generalization_score fell from 0.83049196 to 0.82217761, mostly due to lower clean accuracy and stress_mean.
asi.next_action_hint: Stop lower-temperature tuning; if using final budget, only test the symmetric small higher nudge T=2.25 or a safe wrapper override patch.

description: T=2.25 improved stress metrics but lost score and raw NLL versus T=2 incumbent.

asi.hypothesis: A slightly softer T=2.25 target near the alpha=0.70 winner might improve robustness without the broad T=2.5 degradation.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary generalization_score remained below incumbent 0.83049196 and cal_loss worsened by about 0.058, exceeding the near-tie acceptance rule despite better stress metrics.
asi.next_action_hint: Treat T=2.25 only as a robustness-profile observation, not a finalist under current scoring; freeze exploration or patch safe global overrides if starting a new segment.

name: ML2 CV Locked Confirmation Alpha 0.70 vs 0.75

description: LOCKED confirmation baseline alpha=0.70 on seeds 40-44.

asi.hypothesis: Confirm whether exploration scalar incumbent alpha=0.70 generalizes to locked seeds 40-44 before comparing the alpha=0.75 robustness finalist.
asi.notes: This is the locked-seed baseline; do not add new challengers based on this result.

description: LOCKED alpha=0.75 robustness finalist lost substantial scalar/clean accuracy versus alpha=0.70.

asi.hypothesis: Confirm whether alpha=0.75's exploration robustness profile generalizes better than alpha=0.70 on locked seeds 40-44.
asi.rollback_reason: Locked primary generalization_score was 0.81530544 versus alpha=0.70 baseline 0.82871092; mean clean accuracy and stress_mean were also worse. Alpha=0.75 did improve stress_worst, but not enough to satisfy the predeclared near-tie robustness rule.
asi.next_action_hint: Freeze locked comparison; do not add challengers. Prefer alpha=0.70 unless a manual per-seed audit reveals unacceptable worst-seed/stress behavior.

description: User-interrupted rerun of locked alpha=0.70 incumbent; no new evidence.

asi.hypothesis: Accidental next iteration reran the locked alpha=0.70 incumbent on seeds 40-44.
asi.error: run_experiment returned aborted before metrics were produced.
asi.rollback_reason: No complete benchmark metrics; repeated locked-seed reruns should be avoided to prevent overfitting/confirmation leakage.
asi.next_action_hint: Do not run more locked confirmation iterations; if optimizing runtime, start a separate profiling/throughput segment with metrics-preserving infrastructure changes only.

name: ML2 CV Runtime Speedups for Frozen Locked Recipe

description: Batched teacher TTA views into one forward pass for faster frozen-recipe benchmark.

asi.hypothesis: Batching the five teacher TTA views into a single larger forward pass preserves semantics while reducing teacher logit-collection wall time for the frozen alpha=0.70 recipe.
asi.notes: This is a runtime/infrastructure segment, not additional recipe selection. The repeated locked generalization metrics should not be used to add challengers or tune the model; the recipe remains frozen at T=2 alpha=0.70 labeled=0.50 unlabeled=1.00 epoch=75.

name: ML2 CV MaxViT KD Transfer Search
ML2 CV MaxViT KD Transfer Search

description: MaxViT baseline crashed because teacher fine-tune train split was empty.

asi.hypothesis: Baseline MaxViT staged teacher with softer KD (T=4 alpha=0.50 unlabeled=0.50) should reduce overconfident teacher pressure versus initial MaxViT grid.
asi.error: ValueError: num_samples should be a positive integer value, got num_samples=0 while creating teacher train DataLoader.
asi.rollback_reason: Benchmark infrastructure/data-split failure; no student metrics produced.
asi.next_action_hint: Inspect autoresearch_eval/run_kd_cv configuration and data path handling to ensure seed-30 teacher fine-tune has nonempty labeled training data before rerunning.

description: Single-seed MaxViT benchmark completed training but crashed while normalizing kd_validation_run metrics.

asi.hypothesis: Fixing the wrapper to use split-validation KD for seeds=1 should allow the intended MaxViT single-seed triage baseline to run.
asi.error: autoresearch_eval expected mean_val_acc from kd_cv_run, but run_kd produced kd_validation_run with best_val_acc/best_val_loss fields.
asi.rollback_reason: Benchmark wrapper metric-normalization bug; METRIC lines were not emitted despite completed training.
asi.next_action_hint: Normalize kd_validation_run best_val_acc/best_val_loss to the same scalar interface, then rerun or use as a known weak baseline reference.

description: MaxViT single-seed baseline with T=4 alpha=0.50 unlabeled=0.50 and wrapper support for seeds=1 triage.

asi.hypothesis: Reducing unlabeled MaxViT KD pressure to 0.50 and using softer T=4 alpha=0.50 should mitigate overconfident teacher transfer relative to the initial MaxViT grid.
asi.notes: This establishes the new MaxViT-transfer segment baseline and fixes the benchmark wrapper so seeds=1 uses split-validation KD instead of invalid one-fold CV. The baseline is weak versus prior B0 profile, so subsequent tests should seek large gains.
